mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, email, password, avatar, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN workspace_user wu ON wu.user_id = u.id WHERE wu.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1, status = 0, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
